options.content:
**Tier B / research mode only.** These panels surface data captured when a user has explicitly opted into Research mode under Tools → Privacy. Empty panels in a fresh deployment are expected — the call sites for `dwell` / `orbit_*` / `browse_search` / `vr_interaction` land in Commits 12 and 13. `tour_question_answered` is already wired (Commit 9.5).

See `docs/ANALYTICS_QUERIES.md` for the full set of Tier B query patterns.

panels.title: Tour quiz — worst-answered questions
panels.description: Author-set question_id, ordered by lowest correctness rate. Helps tour authors see where learners struggle.

targets.rawSql: SELECT blob6 AS tour_id, blob5 AS question_id, count() AS attempts, sum(if(blob7 = 'true', 1, 0)) / count() AS correctness_rate, avg(double5) AS avg_response_ms FROM terraviz_events WHERE blob1 = 'tour_question_answered' AND blob2 = '$environment' AND blob4 = 'false' AND timestamp > $__from GROUP BY tour_id, question_id HAVING attempts > 5 ORDER BY correctness_rate ASC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Browse search — top hashed queries
panels.description: SHA-256 prefix of search queries (12 hex chars). The same query always hashes the same way; we never see the words.

targets.rawSql: SELECT blob5 AS query_hash, count() AS searches, avg(double2) AS avg_result_count FROM terraviz_events WHERE blob1 = 'browse_search' AND blob2 = '$environment' AND blob4 = 'false' AND timestamp > $__from GROUP BY query_hash ORDER BY searches DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Panel dwell time distribution
panels.description: How long users dwell on each panel (chat, info, browse, tools, individual datasets) — p50 + p95.

targets.rawSql: SELECT blob5 AS view_target, quantile(0.50)(double2) AS p50_ms, quantile(0.95)(double2) AS p95_ms, count() AS samples FROM terraviz_events WHERE blob1 = 'dwell' AND blob2 = '$environment' AND blob4 = 'false' AND timestamp > $__from GROUP BY view_target ORDER BY samples DESC
